subject: Reporting Enhancements

Patch Set 1:

Hi Sundar, seem like issue is at "RaptorControllerAsyncNewTest.retrieveDataForGivenQuery2Test:1383 » NullPointer" due to some changes in this commit. Can you please fix the JUnit test to pass?

Patch Set 1:

> (1 comment)

These SQLs are coined from sql.properties which is in WEB-INF/conf. sql.properties allows us to switch to different DBType as long as that particular sql.properties is available. Hence preparedStatement may not work in this regard. There are many checks and inserts done in sql for optimization when formfield is involved. PreparedStatement wouldn't provide that convenience since Reporting feature deals with Application User's custom SQL.

Patch Set 1:
